use.flag: Build the zed-extension CLI for managing extensions
Use mimalloc as the global memory allocator for improved performance
Enable Neovim integration for full vim compatibility via RPC
Build the remote server for SSH remote development
Enable screen capture support for collaboration sessions
Enable Tracy profiler integration for performance analysis

pkgmetadata.longdescription: Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter. This is the source-compiled version. For the pre-built binary package, use app-editors/zed-bin instead.
